scripts.dev:weapp: npm run clean:weapp && NODE_ENV=development taro build --type weapp --watch
scripts.dev:weapp:prod: npm run clean:weapp && APP_ENV=production NODE_ENV=production TARO_APP_API_BASE=${TARO_APP_API_BASE:-https://api.hezeyunchuang.com/api/v1} TARO_APP_H5_URL=${TARO_APP_H5_URL:-https://hezeyunchuang.com/app/} TARO_APP_ENABLE_NOTIFICATION_WS=${TARO_APP_ENABLE_NOTIFICATION_WS:-true} taro build --type weapp --watch
scripts.build:h5: npm run gen:tab-icons && APP_ENV=${APP_ENV:-local} NODE_ENV=production taro build --type h5
scripts.build:weapp: npm run clean:weapp && npm run gen:tab-icons && APP_ENV=${APP_ENV:-local} NODE_ENV=production taro build --type weapp
scripts.build:weapp:prod: npm run clean:weapp && APP_ENV=production NODE_ENV=production TARO_APP_API_BASE=${TARO_APP_API_BASE:-https://api.hezeyunchuang.com/api/v1} TARO_APP_H5_URL=${TARO_APP_H5_URL:-https://hezeyunchuang.com/app/} TARO_APP_ENABLE_NOTIFICATION_WS=${TARO_APP_ENABLE_NOTIFICATION_WS:-true} npm run gen:tab-icons && taro build --type weapp
